title: Multi-Metal 3D Printing LPBF: From Apple Watch Cases to Functionally Graded Parts

title: Cold Metal Fusion 3D Printing: The Next-Generation Metal AM Technology Beyond LPBF

title: JetAI: AI-Driven Optimization of Binder Jetting for Titanium Alloys
summary: JetAI is an AI-driven framework combining quantum-inspired algorithms and machine learning to optimize binder jetting parameters for titanium alloy aerospace components — achieving 36.7% isotropy improvement and superior tensile strength over classical methods.
